sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6033" key="a)mfipro/stulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιπρόστῡλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n6033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having a portico on either front,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
